records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, I didn't know you were the type of person who could plan a surprise party like this.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Die Dekoration trifft zwar meinen Geschmack nicht so richtig, aber der Wille z95thlt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, I never thought you'd take notice of an ordinary mercenary like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you're one of those people who can't walk away from starving stray cats, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike a stray cat, I feel very uncomfortable if I don't give back as much as I was been given.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I won't take no for an answer.
